time-plate.$description: 196px — the fixed width of the desktop webinar-card time plate (source webinar-card.dc.html: grid-template-columns 196px 1fr). Wide enough for the 56px tabular time and a ONE-line «Эфир № N» label. Surfaced as the `w-time-plate` sizing utility (--spacing-time-plate @theme key); ≤900px the plate is a full-width horizontal band instead.

game.$description: RESERVED namespace for future gamification (PRD §15: mascot, Lottie/Rive cards, Con/Pul/Au). Deliberately empty — no values in this foundation iteration; the game components are out of scope (#231 spec §2.1, §6). Tokens land here when those surfaces arrive without restructuring the taxonomy.
